meaning: n.[物]偏振(现象),极化(作用),两极化,分化
examples: None of these countries has found a way yet to get around the problem of the polarization of wealth.
It's the effect of interchain coupling on the inversed polarization of a biexciton in conjugated polymers.
What makes it worse is that glib polarization is especially unfortunate given the current situation.
Insecurity breeds alienation and polarization, both of which are stronger on the political right.
